---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: FAAQJAVED
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the use case. What are you trying to do that the tool currently doesn't support?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible — config keys, CLI flags, expected output format, etc.

## Alternatives you've considered

Any workarounds you've tried, or other approaches that could solve the same problem.

## Would you be willing to contribute this?

- [ ] Yes — I can open a pull request
- [ ] Partial — I can write the tests but not the implementation
- [ ] No — I'm requesting it for someone else to implement
